scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.ci:
npm run build && npm test && node -e "console.log('\x1b[32m
------------------------
✓   All tests passed
------------------------\x1b[0m')" || node -e "console.error('\x1b[31m
------------------------
✗   Tests failed
------------------------\x1b[0m'); process.exit(1)"
